title: therofon jamesii
side_effects: Therofon jamesii can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches, which may be caused by excessive consumption of its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can also lead to skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, improper use of Therofon jamesii may cause liver and kidney damage, as well as increased risk of seizures and coma. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Therofon jamesii for any health benefits.
